prompt: How many of the three VCF records below pass quality filtering?
context:
#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	S001	S002
chr01	5012841	.	A	G	342	PASS	AF=0.50;AN=4;AC=2	GT:DP	0/1:25	0/1:30
chr01	5012903	.	C	T	28	LowQual	AF=0.25;AN=4;AC=1	GT:DP	0/0:8	0/1:5
chr01	5012967	.	G	A	512	PASS	AF=0.75;AN=4;AC=3	GT:DP	0/1:35	1/1:40
rubric: Must answer 2. Records at positions 5012841 and 5012967 have FILTER=PASS. The record at 5012903 has FILTER=LowQual and does not pass.
notes: Tests understanding of the FILTER column in VCF. PASS indicates the record passed all filters; any other value (e.g., LowQual) indicates a failed filter.
